name: Green Corn Pudding
recipeIngredient: 2 to 3 cups raw corn cut from the cobs
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs with the cream until blended.
2. Add the corn, butter, sugar, sage, salt, and pepper to the egg mixture.
3. Pour the mixture into a buttered 2-quart baking dish.
4. Place the dish in a pan of water and bake for 1 hour at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C), or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
